political.s: Moderna spent $1.25 million lobbying in 2025 and $305,000 in 2024. The company contributed $114,198 through employee/member donations in 2024. Moderna participates in industry trade group BIO's political engagement, including contributions to both Democratic and Republican-aligned organizations.

charity.s: Moderna established its Charitable Foundation in 2022 with an initial $50 million endowment. The foundation contributed $8.5+ million in grants in 2022, focusing on public health, scientific education, and diversity/inclusion. Primary grantees include Boston Medical Center, Heading Home, and International Rescue Committee.
charity.focus: Public health, healthcare access, scientific education, diversity & inclusion, COVID-19 relief

environment.s: Moderna has set ambitious climate targets validated by Science Based Targets initiative: net-zero Scopes 1&2 by 2030 (90% reduction from 2021 baseline) and net-zero Scope 3 by 2045. The company implements sustainability by design in new facilities and subsidizes green transportation. 2022 carbon emissions were approximately 115.6 million kg CO2e.

labor.s: Moderna has 4,700 employees and ranks as a top employer with above-benchmark engagement scores. The company emphasizes belonging and inclusive culture. Recent layoffs (headcount fell from 5,800 to 4,700 in 2025) were part of cost-reduction initiatives. Limited public data on OSHA/NLRB violations.

dei.s: Moderna publicly commits to diversity, equity, inclusion and belonging (DEIB) through its CSR strategy. The company advocates for diversity and inclusion in underserved populations and conducts research trials reflecting populations impacted by diseases studied. Leadership emphasizes belonging as core to company culture.

animals.s: Moderna tests pharmaceuticals on animals as required by FDA regulations. The company conducted animal testing for COVID-19 vaccine development, though some testing occurred in parallel with human trials rather than sequentially. All batches of injectable vaccines require animal-based pyrogenicity testing per FDA mandate.

guns.s: Not applicable. Moderna is a biotechnology/pharmaceutical company with no involvement in firearms manufacture or sales.

privacy.s: Moderna maintains privacy policies covering website visitors, clinical trial participants, and candidates. The company collects personal data for business operations and complies with HIPAA, CCPA, and GDPR. Privacy practices include data retention policies and third-party vendor management, though website terms disclaim liability for internet privacy.

execPay.s: CEO Stéphane Bancel received $19.88 million in total compensation in 2024 (base salary $1.63M, stock award $7.65M, other compensation $975K). Bancel's realized pay was at 20th percentile of peer group due to stock price decline. Performance-based awards vested at only 50% of target in the 2023-2025 review period.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
